_comment: Per-tool copy for standard page blocks (how-to, use cases, FAQ when no FAQPage in HTML). category: text-tools | developer-tools | image-tools | seo-tools

how_to: Paste or type your text in the box.
Watch words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs update instantly.
Use Copy or Clear when you are done.
use_cases: Hit school or editorial word targets without uploading your document.
Check title and description length before publishing.
Stay within character limits for each platform.

how_to: Choose length and character types (letters, numbers, symbols).
Click Generate to create a new random password.
Copy once and store it in your password manager—never reuse across sites.
use_cases: Create a strong unique password for every signup.
Generate a fresh secret when you suspect a leak.
Use random strings for local test data (not production secrets alone).

how_to: Paste JSON into the editor.
Use Format/Beautify to read it, or Minify for compact output.
Fix any syntax error the validator reports, then copy the result.
use_cases: Validate snippets before dropping them into templates.
Spot trailing commas and quoting issues quickly.

how_to: Paste your source text.
Enter find text and replacement (optionally enable case-sensitive mode).
Use Replace All or step through, then copy the result.
use_cases: Rename repeated labels across a long paste.
Swap delimiters or fix typos in bulk.

how_to: Pick how many paragraphs you need.
Generate placeholder copy.
Copy into your layout or CMS preview.
use_cases: Fill cards and columns before real copy exists.
Show typography rhythm without distracting text.
Stand in for body copy during reviews.

how_to: Paste messy text from PDFs, email, or the web.
Choose collapse spaces, trim lines, and/or remove empty lines.
Copy the cleaned version into your doc or editor.
use_cases: Remove double spaces and broken line breaks.
Tighten blocks before quoting or archiving.

how_to: Drag in or select JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP images.
Adjust quality and output format.
Download the smaller file—processing stays in your browser.
use_cases: Reduce hero and inline image weight.

how_to: Click Generate for a new five-color palette.
Click any swatch to copy its HEX code.
Repeat until you find a set that fits your UI spike.
use_cases: Copy HEX values straight into your stylesheet.

how_to: Paste or type your text.
Tap UPPERCASE, Title Case, camelCase, or another mode.
Copy the converted text or clear and start over.
use_cases: Switch to camelCase for variables and APIs.
Fix inconsistent capitalization in one pass.

how_to: Paste a headline or phrase.
Review the generated slug (lowercase, hyphenated).
Copy into your CMS, router, or static site config.
Paste article body text (headings optional).
Adjust words-per-minute if your audience reads faster or slower.
Use the estimated read time in bylines or meta.
use_cases: Balance lesson length across a syllabus.

how_to: Paste UTF-8 text or a Base64 string.
Choose Encode or Decode.
Copy the output for tokens, snippets, or debugging.
use_cases: Inspect Base64url payloads alongside the JWT decoder.
Move small blobs through JSON-safe strings.

how_to: Click Generate for a random version 4 UUID.
Copy the value into your migration, fixture, or API client.
Generate as many as you need—each click is independent.
use_cases: Primary keys for new rows in dev.
Tag requests across services in logs.
Stable-looking IDs for examples and tests.

how_to: Paste a URL or a string that should be encoded/decoded.
Pick the mode that matches your use (component vs full URL).
Copy the transformed value into your code or browser bar.
use_cases: Wrap deep links passed as parameters.

how_to: Paste the text you want to digest.
Choose SHA-256 or SHA-1 (hex output).
Copy the hash for checksums or quick comparisons.
use_cases: Compare hashes before and after a transfer.
Hash JSON after formatting to spot silent edits.

how_to: Paste a JWT (three Base64url segments separated by dots).
Read the decoded header and payload JSON locally.
Remember: decode ≠ verify—check signatures only in trusted backends.
use_cases: Inspect claims and expiry during integration.
Compare issuer, audience, and scopes quickly.
Pair with the JWT guide for decode vs verify.

how_to: Paste one item per line.
Choose whether to trim whitespace before comparing keys.
Dedupe and copy—first occurrence is kept by default.
use_cases: Shrink noisy stack traces or events for review.

how_to: Paste lines (one row per item).
Toggle ignore-case if your list mixes capitalization.
Sort A→Z or Z→A, then copy the result.
